text:
*[Bug 19007] labels are not parallel to axes in persp() plot on Debian Linux*
<https://bugs.r-project.org/show_bug.cgi?id=19007>

Martin Maechler (<mailto:maechler@stat.math.ethz.ch|maechler@stat.math.ethz.ch>) changed:

           What    |Removed                     |Added
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
     Ever confirmed|0                           |1
             Status|UNCONFIRMED                 |CONFIRMED
                 CC|                            |maechler@stat.math.ethz.ch

--- Comment #1 from Martin Maechler (<mailto:maechler@stat.math.ethz.ch|maechler@stat.math.ethz.ch>) ---
Ha...  it's a simple thinko / typo :
as you correctly noted it is depending on HAVE_ATAN2PI;
in case the header files/library have atan2pi()  it should be _used_
instead of accidentally still using `atan2()`.

With svn r89444, I have fixed this.
Can you confirm this fixes the problem for you?
Then, I'd also back port this to the R-4-5 branch such that it will get into
R 4.5.2
